entry.em: ..EXTREME HEAT WARNING IN EFFECT UNTIL 7 PM CDT THIS EVENING

entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 80
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 80
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 70
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 105 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
